description: outcome=no_agreement allowed to mention rejected terms (Lesson e637440 et al — no-deal closes can name terms peer asked for).
source: fix series 1d68f01, 8d02c43, 2229fe6 — no-deal replies/closes may mention rejected terms

unresolved_items.reason: peer floor $750 exceeds owner ceiling $650 with no headroom

next_steps.step: owner decides whether to walk away or escalate budget

close_draft.owner_summary: No deal: peer's price floor was $750, beyond budget ceiling. Owner has not approved exceeding $650. Walking away.
